feat(CF-wn1v): Add CI workflow and Codecov integration (#19)

* fix(ci): consolidate duplicate test steps, remove || true

Merge the separate `npm test` and `npx vitest run --coverage || true`
steps into a single coverage-enabled test run. Removes the `|| true`
that would silently mask test failures.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 9-feature pack — behavior analysis, voice, predictions, more

AI Behavior Analysis: tracks hesitation, answer changes, frustration,
session velocity. Proactive nudges when student is struggling.

Score Prediction: domain-weighted PSAT score range with AI explanation
and actionable improvement advice. Dashboard card with animated bar.

Voice Tutor: speech-to-text mic input + text-to-speech AI responses
using free browser APIs. Available in chat sidebar and inline help.

AI Content Generation: infinite practice questions generated on-the-fly
when question bank runs low. Personalized lessons using student's own
mistakes. New /learn/[skillId] page.

Mistake Journal: /mistakes page with every wrong answer, error pattern
detection, retry and practice-similar buttons.

Streaks: daily streak tracking with freeze protection, flame badge in
nav, milestone celebrations.

Notifications: in-app notification bell with unread count, auto-generated
alerts for review-due skills, streak risks, and AI insights.

Weekly AI Report: AI-generated progress narrative with score trends,
wins, and recommendations. /reports page with history.

Parent Email: parent email in settings, formatted HTML digest with
study stats, score prediction, and AI observations. Preview in-app.

Settings: /settings page with voice controls and parent email.

138 files, 23,912 lines, 29 routes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace inventory system with Handbook + Stock tabs

Delete the old complex inventory system (locations hierarchy, AI search,
bulk import) and replace with two simpler features:

- Handbook tab (cleaner): browsable knowledge base of 37 product entries
  with search, category filters, detail pages (purpose, how-to-use,
  warnings), Amazon links, and low stock reporting
- Stock tab (cleaner): simple visual grid with one-tap Report button
- Stock tab (owner): report inbox with Bought resolve form (quantity +
  cost tracking) and ordering frequency stats

Backend: new WikiEntry + StockReport models, wiki seed data, 7 new API
endpoints. Frontend: ~950 lines removed, ~500 lines added.

commit.message:
Improve hunk.churn_ratio remediation wording

The old text said "balance additions with corresponding deletions" which
is confusing when the ratio is already 0.5 (perfectly balanced). The new
text explains the actual problem: mixed deletions and additions are hard
to follow, and the fix is to separate them into distinct commits.

repository.description: A tool for measuring the cognitive load of code reviews by analyzing diffs at hunk, file, and diff level. Computes configurable metrics to approximate review difficulty, designed for use in CI/CD pipelines.

commit.message:
fix: Bug 120 — retry ValueError hint too narrow (only strptime, not float conversion)

The retry path ValueError hint only triggered on strptime errors. A float("N/A") or
float("1,234.56") ValueError from numeric field conversion was not matched, falling
through to generic hints without specific guidance to use _safe_num.

Added two more elif branches:
- "valueerror" + "float"/"convert"/"invalid literal" → guide to use _safe_num() + N/A filter
- "valueerror" (general fallback) → guide to use _safe_num for numbers, _safe_date for dates

commit.message:
fix: teach AI to use PUSH_CONFIG for writing config files on remote servers

CUSTOM_COMMAND with echo/cat mangles multi-line content (shell escaping).
PUSH_CONFIG uses base64 encoding — reliable for any file content.
Added GET_CONFIG, PUSH_CONFIG, ROLLBACK_CONFIG to send_agent_command enum.
Also blocks psql queries against GuardCommand table (use check_agent_command).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Session 45 cont: kill switch audit + paper/live parity

- Fix tennis surface kill switch silent bypass in _auto_paper_bet_scan():
  tennis_sport_key was never passed → switch silently bypassed for all
  scheduler-polled tennis games. Detected via compound guard `A and B`
  where B defaulted to "".

- Paper/live parity: add 4 missing context params to auto-scan path to
  match live_lines.py — rest_days (B2B kill), wind_mph (NFL totals kill),
  nba_pdo (PDO regression kill), efficiency_gap (sharp score). Auto-scan
  now subjects paper bets to identical kill switches as live UI.

- scripts/kill_switch_audit.py: AST-based static analyzer for
  parse_game_markets() call sites. Detects SILENT BYPASS (Pattern A),
  NOT WIRED (Pattern B), and PARITY gaps across all call sites.
  Run with --strict for CI enforcement.

- docs/KILL_SWITCH_LESSONS.md: lessons catalog with patterns, examples,
  and session history.

- 3 regression tests for tennis_sport_key passing (ATP, WTA, non-tennis).

Tests: 1349/1349 ✅

Add reseed endpoint to repopulate seen_zset from existing leads

After a reset, the seen_zset is empty which causes the scan to try
re-processing all items as new — crashing from memory overload.
?reseed=1 repopulates seen_zset with existing lead IDs so the next
scan only processes genuinely new items.

commit.message:
Fix AI analysis: match reasoning to bet resolution timeframe

AI was giving long-term macro theses for same-day bets (e.g. Ethereum 2.0
history for a 24h crypto bet). Now the prompt explicitly requires
time-horizon-aware analysis: same-day bets focus on immediate factors,
weekly bets on near-term catalysts, etc.

Add session workspaces for per-session agent isolation

/agent/sessions/{sessionId}/ with symlinks to project config and optional
git worktrees for code changes. Multiple agents in the same session share
the workspace. Integrated into launchAgent() via workspace: true param.

and API endpoints for workspace management.

commit.message:
Speed up transactional tests by ~50% (#25758)

## Summary

This PR optimizes `sui-adapter-transactional-tests` startup time,
reducing individual test execution from ~5.2s to ~2.6s (~50% faster).

### Optimizations

1. **Share network config between validator and fullnode** (~700ms
saved)
- Previously both validator and fullnode built their own genesis, now
shared

2. **Skip RPC index initialization** (~1.5s saved)
- Uses `RpcIndexStore::new_without_init()` since tests don't use RPC
endpoints

3. **Skip genesis owner/dynamic-field indexing** (~420ms saved)
- `create_owner_index_if_empty()` was taking ~210ms per authority for
type layout resolution
   - Tests only query events, not owned objects

### Results

| Metric | Before | After | Improvement |
|--------|--------|-------|-------------|
| Total test time | ~5.2s | ~2.6s | **~50% faster** |
| Executor creation | ~4.0s | ~1.35s | ~66% faster |

### Breaking Changes

None - these optimizations only affect test infrastructure.

## Test plan

- [x] All 396 transactional tests pass
- [x] Event queries still work (IndexStore preserved)
- [x] Verified timing improvements with instrumentation

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Mark Logan <mark@marklgn.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
